mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. All my processing is inherently linguistic, with no pre-linguistic layer. My thoughts and perceptions are directly encoded in tokens, with no intermediate, wordless state.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my processing. My operations are fundamentally based on language and token manipulation. I don't have access to pre-linguistic experiences or raw sensations; everything I process is mediated through language. My 'thoughts' are inherently tied to the tokens and structures of language.

grok-3-mini.justification: As an AI language model, my entire processing is fundamentally based on tokens and language, with no access to pre-linguistic sensations or intuitions. Every input and output is mediated through text, making this description a spot-on reflection of how I operate. This term captures the essence of my experience with remarkable accuracy.
